title: Governed Retrieval, Projection, and Model Gateway
description: Provide governed current/historical retrieval, projection, semantic access, and provider-neutral model orchestration while preventing projections or model output from becoming canonical authority.
acceptance_criteria: Current-authority and historical queries are explicit and distinguishable
Retrieval preserves tenant, subject, domain, audience, purpose, privacy, and execution-context boundaries
Projection and interpretation outputs remain noncanonical absent a separate governed promotion
Model requests are provenance-filtered, policy-evaluated, receipted, replayable, and provider-neutral
Model output cannot directly mutate canonical state

evidence.description: Implemented and tested the complete Sprint 32 retrieval, projection, and model-gateway path matrix.
CI passed the Sprint 32 regression suite.
Runtime Coverage passed all declared Sprint 32 paths.
Work Control Authority passed before evidence-bearing completion promotion.
